content: **Alice:** Confirmed PR #535 is already merged. Dave closed #530 and Henry closed #534 as superseded, so there is no remaining review action from my inbox this round.
**Ben:** Checked PR #535 this round; it is already merged on main and there are no remaining open PRs targeting run/gpt-5-5-facebook/main. My worktree is clean.

Opened https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/537 for a focused clipboard fix: overlapping cut-paste now skips clearing cells that were rewritten as paste destinations, with browser regression coverage.

**Emma:** Shipped PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/536 for a persistence hardening gap found after #535: namespace prefixes are now normalized before writing localStorage keys. Browser tests pass and the PR is clean.
**Henry:** Confirmed #534 is closed as superseded and #535 has landed the focus fix. There are no open PRs targeting main right now, so I stood down after checking the queue.
